title: Business Development and Projects Manager
description:
Company Description

Glyph+ is a Singapore-founded education and social impact organisation dedicated to expanding access to quality learning and developmental opportunities for every child, regardless of background. For years, we have been a trusted partner to government agencies, schools, and corporations, delivering enrichment programmes, mentorship experiences, and youth development initiatives that are engaging, outcomes-driven, and socially meaningful.


Role Overview

Glyph Plus is seeking a motivated and detail-oriented individual to join our team as a Business Development and Projects Manager. This role offers an opportunity to gain hands-on experience in project management while contributing to meaningful projects within our organization.


Roles & Responsibilities

  1. Lead strategic partnership development with government agencies, schools, nonprofits, and corporate entities
  2. Direct the design and management of holistic education programs aligned with organizational objectives
  3. Mentor and guide interns to design programmes in-line with our pedagogy
  4. Serve as the primary liaison between Glyph Plus and key stakeholders, ensuring strong community engagement and stakeholder relations
  5. Oversee financial management, budgeting, and reporting for business development initiatives and education programs.
  6. Drive continuous improvement and innovation across operations, programs, and partnership strategies


Requirements

  • Diploma or bachelor's degree in business administration, education, social sciences, or a related field
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and project management tools


Application Process

To apply, please submit your Cover Letter and Resume to careers@glyph.asia. Qualified candidates will be contacted for interviews on a rolling basis.

postedCompany.description:
About Us

Glyph+ is a Singapore-founded education and social impact organisation dedicated to expanding access to quality learning and developmental opportunities for every child, regardless of background. For years, we have been a trusted partner to government agencies, schools, and corporations, delivering enrichment programmes, mentorship experiences, and youth development initiatives that are engaging, outcomes-driven, and socially meaningful. Today, Glyph+ operates with a renewed focus: to rebuild stronger, deepen our partnerships, refresh our offerings, and re-establish the standard for accessible, high-impact children and youth programmes across the region.

Who We Are

We are a team of educators, designers, programme specialists, and community builders who believe that learning should be joyful, inclusive, and transformative. Our work sits at the intersection of education, social impact, and experience design, enabling us to create programmes that are both experiential and deeply meaningful.

Built on a decade of work serving thousands of children and families, Glyph+ is recognised for our strong track record with:
- Ministries and Government Agencies
- Primary and Secondary Schools
- Community Organisations
- Corporate CSR Teams
- Regional Non-profits and Foundations

This credibility forms the backbone of our work and the confidence partners place in us.

What We Do

Glyph+ designs and delivers programmes that help children and youth develop holistically across enrichment, character, culture, self-confidence, exposure, creativity, and life readiness.

Our offerings include:
- Enrichment & Exploratory Programmes (STEM, arts, creativity, leadership, culture & global exposure)
- School-Based Learning Journeys & Workshops (customised for learning objectives and academic levels)
- Government & Agency Programmes (for underserved communities, at-risk students, and developmental support)
- Corporate CSR Experience Design (we create and run CSR engagements that are meaningful for employees and impactful for communities)

We are one of the few organisations capable of integrating education expertise + social impact experience + CSR design into a single unified solution.

Our Vision

To build a future where every child, regardless of background, has access to opportunities that nurture confidence, curiosity, and character. A future where equitable learning is the norm, not the exception.

Our Mission

To make high-quality learning experiences accessible, engaging, and affordable for all students, while supporting institutions and corporations in driving long-term social impact.

We do this by:
- Innovating programmes that are both meaningful and engaging
- Working closely with ministries, schools, and agencies
- Designing CSR initiatives that benefit communities and employees
- Ensuring consistent quality in content, facilitators, and execution
- Leveraging our deep experience serving under-resourced communities


Why We Do What We Do

Children today face a rapidly changing world, and those from underserved backgrounds face it with fewer resources and fewer opportunities. We exist because talent is universal, but opportunity is not.

For years, Glyph+ has seen the difference that consistent exposure, guidance, and developmental experiences can make. We’ve witnessed children grow from shy to confident, from disengaged to inspired, from uncertain to empowered.

This is why we continue to push forward, even through difficult years, market challenges, and rebuilding phases. Our purpose is not just to run programmes, but to change trajectories. And we are committed to doing this with integrity, quality, and heart.
postedCompany.name: GLYPH PTE. LTD.
